title: Bulk deletion of items from the trash.
excerpt: we need to create a command for mass deletion of items from the trash, as items that remain in the trash have a direct impact on the limit of items on the board and the functioning of the board. There are 9,000 items in …

posts.author: tiagoengel (Tiago Engel)
posts.cookedHtml:
we need to create a command for mass deletion of items from the trash, as items that remain in the trash have a direct impact on the limit of items on the board and the functioning of the board. There are 9,000 items in my recycle bin and manual selection of each element is unfeasible. We cannot be stuck waiting for 30 days for the trash to be cleaned. We are paying a high price for the service.
This impacts all hiring models. even the Enterprise.
